# panos_administrator (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "panos_administrator" "example" {
  location = {
    panorama = {}
  }
  name                   = "admin-user"
  authentication_profile = "my-auth-profile"

  permissions = {
    role_based = {
      superuser = true
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `location` (Attributes) The location of this object. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location))
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `authentication_profile` (String) Authentication profile for this administrator
- `client_certificate_only` (Boolean) Is client certificate authentication enough?
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Hashed administrator password
- `password_profile` (String)
- `permissions` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permissions))
- `preferences` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--preferences))
- `public_key` (String) SSH public key for certificate-based authentication

<a id="nestedatt--location"></a>
### Nested Schema for `location`

Optional:

- `ngfw` (Attributes) Located within device-level configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location--ngfw))
- `panorama` (Attributes) Located in panorama. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location--panorama))
- `template` (Attributes) A management configuration object located within a specific template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location--template))
- `template_stack` (Attributes) A management configuration object located within a specific template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location--template_stack))

Optional:

<a id="nestedatt--location--template_stack"></a>
### Nested Schema for `location.template_stack`

Optional:

<a id="nestedatt--permissions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permissions`

Optional:

- `role_based` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permissions--role_based))

<a id="nestedatt--permissions--role_based"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permissions.role_based`

Optional:

- `custom` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permissions--role_based--custom))
- `device_admins` (List of String) Device administrator access (all vsys)
- `device_readers` (List of String) Device read-only access (all vsys)
- `panorama_admin` (String)
- `superreader` (String) Read-only access to entire system
- `superuser` (String) Full system access
- `vsys_admins` (Attributes List) Virtual system administrator access (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permissions--role_based--vsys_admins))
- `vsys_readers` (Attributes List) Virtual system read-only access (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permissions--role_based--vsys_readers))

<a id="nestedatt--permissions--role_based--custom"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permissions.role_based.custom`

Optional:

- `profile` (String) Custom admin role profile name
- `vsys` (List of String)

### Nested Schema for `permissions.role_based.vsys_admins`

Required:
